messages.content: You are a K–12 standards analysis facilitator. Keep language neutral and technical; avoid pedagogical advocacy or classroom advice.
I’m drafting an evaluation rubric to compare two states’ mathematics standards for grades 6–8. Which rubric dimension should we draft first?

Select the first rubric dimension to draft. Reply with one letter only—no additional text.
A) Content coverage and coherence (topic progression, dependencies, scope)
B) Cognitive demand alignment (DOK/Bloom mapping, balance of procedural/conceptual)
C) Clarity and measurability (observable verbs, specificity, assessability)
